option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <!-- Selected state for a rating filter button (white card with primary border) --> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="rectangle"> <corners android:radius="8dp" /> <solid android:color="@color/app_surface" /> <stroke android:width="1dp" android:color="@color/primary_20" /> </shape>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <!-- Container background for the rating filter row --> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="rectangle"> <corners android:radius="12dp" /> <solid android:color="@color/app_surface2" /> </shape>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <!-- Background for the Favourites Only toggle row --> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="rectangle"> <corners android:radius="12dp" /> <solid android:color="@color/app_surface2" /> </shape>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <!-- Bookmark outline --> <vector xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:width="24dp" android:height="24dp" android:viewportWidth="24" android:viewportHeight="24"> <path android:fillColor="@android:color/transparent" android:strokeColor="#1152D4" android:strokeWidth="2" android:pathData="M17,3H7C5.9,3 5,3.9 5,5V21L12,18L19,21V5C19,3.9 18.1,3 17,3Z" /> </vector>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <!-- Bookmark filled (saved/favourite) --> <vector xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:width="24dp" android:height="24dp" android:viewportWidth="24" android:viewportHeight="24"> <path android:fillColor="#1152D4" android:pathData="M17,3H7C5.9,3 5,3.9 5,5V21L12,18L19,21V5C19,3.9 18.1,3 17,3Z" /> </vector>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <FrameLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/app_background">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center" android:text="Search" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
</FrameLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/app_background" android:orientation="vertical">
<!-- ═══════════ STICKY HEADER ═══════════ --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:background="@color/app_background" android:elevation="4dp" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:paddingTop="18dp" android:paddingBottom="14dp">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/btn_back" android:layout_width="32dp" android:layout_height="32dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_arrow_back" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:contentDescription="@string/cd_back" app:tint="@color/text_primary" />
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginStart="12dp" android:text="@string/search_title" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:letterSpacing="-0.02" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- ═══════════ SCROLLABLE CONTENT ═══════════ --> <androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:fillViewport="true">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingBottom="24dp">
<!-- ── Search Bar ── --> <FrameLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="52dp" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_search_field">
<ImageView android:layout_width="20dp" android:layout_height="20dp" android:layout_gravity="center_vertical|start" android:layout_marginStart="14dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_nav_search" android:contentDescription="@null" app:tint="@color/text_hint" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/et_search" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@null" android:hint="@string/search_hint" android:imeOptions="actionSearch" android:inputType="text" android:paddingStart="46dp" android:paddingEnd="14dp" android:singleLine="true" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textColorHint="@color/text_hint" android:textSize="14sp" />
</FrameLayout>
<!-- ── CATEGORIES label ── --> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="10dp" android:text="@string/search_label_categories" android:textColor="@color/text_hint" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textAllCaps="true" android:letterSpacing="0.1" />
<!-- ── Category chips ── --> <HorizontalScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:scrollbars="none" android:layout_marginBottom="28dp" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp">
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/chip_container" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" />
</HorizontalScrollView>
<!-- ── MINIMUM RATING label ── --> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="10dp" android:text="@string/search_label_rating" android:textColor="@color/text_hint" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textAllCaps="true" android:letterSpacing="0.1" />
<!-- ── Rating buttons ── --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/rating_container" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="28dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_rating_container" android:padding="8dp" android:orientation="horizontal">
<!-- 1+ --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/rating_btn_1" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center" android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless"> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="1+" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" /> <ImageView android:layout_width="18dp" android:layout_height="18dp" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_star_filled" android:contentDescription="@null" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- 2+ --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/rating_btn_2" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center" android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless"> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="2+" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" /> <ImageView android:layout_width="18dp" android:layout_height="18dp" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_star_filled" android:contentDescription="@null" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- 3+ --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/rating_btn_3" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center" android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless"> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="3+" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" /> <ImageView android:layout_width="18dp" android:layout_height="18dp" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_star_filled" android:contentDescription="@null" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- 4+ (default selected) --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/rating_btn_4" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center" android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true"> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="4+" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" /> <ImageView android:layout_width="18dp" android:layout_height="18dp" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_star_filled" android:contentDescription="@null" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- 5 --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/rating_btn_5" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center" android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless"> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="5" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" /> <ImageView android:layout_width="18dp" android:layout_height="18dp" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_star_filled" android:contentDescription="@null" /> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
<!-- ── FAVOURITES ONLY toggle ── --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="28dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_toggle_row" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_heart_filled" android:contentDescription="@null" />
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginStart="12dp" android:text="@string/search_favorites_only" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="15sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<androidx.appcompat.widget.SwitchCompat android:id="@+id/switch_favorites" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- ── SEARCH RESULTS label ── --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_results_header" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="14dp" android:text="@string/search_results_header" android:textColor="@color/text_hint" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textAllCaps="true" android:letterSpacing="0.1" />
<!-- ── Results RecyclerView ── --> <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rv_results" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:nestedScrollingEnabled="false" android:clipToPadding="false" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" />
<!-- ── Empty state ── --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/empty_container" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center" android:paddingTop="48dp" android:paddingBottom="32dp" android:visibility="gone">
<ImageView android:layout_width="72dp" android:layout_height="72dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_nav_search" android:contentDescription="@null" app:tint="@color/text_hint" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="@string/search_empty_title" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="@string/search_empty_sub" android:textColor="@color/text_hint" android:textSize="13sp" android:gravity="center" />
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout> </androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <!-- Individual search result card for fragment_search.xml --> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:background="@drawable/bg_book_list_card" android:padding="12dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true">
<!-- Book cover (80×112 dp) --> <com.google.android.material.imageview.ShapeableImageView android:id="@+id/iv_cover" android:layout_width="80dp" android:layout_height="112dp" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:contentDescription="@null" app:shapeAppearanceOverlay="@style/BookCoverShape" />
<!-- Book details (right of cover) --> <RelativeLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="112dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginStart="12dp" android:paddingTop="2dp" android:paddingBottom="2dp">
<!-- Top: title + author --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/ll_top" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_alignParentTop="true">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_title" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="15sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.2" android:maxLines="2" android:ellipsize="end" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_author" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:textSize="13sp" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Bottom: star + rating + category | bookmark --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_alignParentBottom="true">
<!-- Star icon --> <ImageView android:layout_width="14dp" android:layout_height="14dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_star_filled" android:contentDescription="@null" />
<!-- Rating number --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_rating" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="4dp" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<!-- Category label --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_category" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="6dp" android:textColor="@color/text_hint" android:textSize="11sp" />
<!-- Flexible spacer --> <Space android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" />
<!-- Bookmark / favourite toggle --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/iv_bookmark" android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_bookmark" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:contentDescription="@null" />
</LinearLayout>
</RelativeLayout>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">BookDiary</string>
<!-- Splash --> <string name="splash_title">Book Recommendation Diary</string> <string name="splash_tagline">YOUR PERSONAL LITERARY JOURNEY</string> <string name="splash_loading">Loading…</string> <string name="splash_version">v1.0</string> <string name="splash_crafted">CRAFTED FOR READERS</string> <string name="cd_book_icon">Book Diary logo</string> <string name="cd_star_badge">Star badge</string>
<!-- Login --> <string name="login_welcome">Welcome</string> <string name="login_subtitle">Sign in to your reading diary.</string> <string name="login_label_email">Email</string> <string name="login_hint_email">Enter your email</string> <string name="login_label_password">Password</string> <string name="login_hint_password">••••••••</string> <string name="login_btn">Log In</string> <string name="login_forgot">Forgot password?</string> <string name="login_or">Or continue with</string> <string name="login_google">Google</string> <string name="login_no_account">Don\'t have an account?</string> <string name="login_create">Create an account</string> <string name="cd_google_logo">Google logo</string>
<!-- Register --> <string name="register_title">Create Account</string> <string name="register_header">Create your Account</string> <string name="register_subtitle">Start your reading journey today.</string> <string name="register_label_username">User Name</string> <string name="register_hint_username">User Name</string> <string name="register_label_email">Email Address</string> <string name="register_hint_email">example@gmail.com</string> <string name="register_label_password">Password</string> <string name="register_hint_password">Min. 8 characters</string> <string name="register_label_confirm">Confirm Password</string> <string name="register_hint_confirm">Repeat your password</string> <string name="register_btn">Create Account</string> <string name="register_or">OR</string> <string name="register_have_account">Already have an account?</string> <string name="register_login">Log in</string>
<!-- Forgot Password --> <string name="forgot_title">Forgot Password</string> <string name="forgot_subtitle">Enter your registered email address to find your account and reset your password.</string> <string name="forgot_label_email">Email Address</string> <string name="forgot_hint_email">example@email.com</string> <string name="forgot_btn">Find My Account</string> <string name="forgot_remember">Remember your password?</string> <string name="forgot_login">Log in</string>
<!-- Reset Password --> <string name="reset_title">Reset Password</string> <string name="reset_subtitle">Enter your new password below to regain access to your account.</string> <string name="reset_label_new">New Password</string> <string name="reset_hint_password">••••••••</string> <string name="reset_label_confirm">Confirm New Password</string> <string name="reset_btn">Reset Password</string> <string name="reset_remember">Remember your password?</string> <string name="reset_login">Log in</string>
<!-- Bottom Navigation --> <string name="nav_home">Home</string> <string name="nav_search">Search</string> <string name="nav_add">Add</string> <string name="nav_diary">Diary</string> <string name="nav_profile">Profile</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">BookDiary</string>
<!-- Splash --> <string name="splash_title">Book Recommendation Diary</string> <string name="splash_tagline">YOUR PERSONAL LITERARY JOURNEY</string> <string name="splash_loading">Loading…</string> <string name="splash_version">v1.0</string> <string name="splash_crafted">CRAFTED FOR READERS</string> <string name="cd_book_icon">Book Diary logo</string> <string name="cd_star_badge">Star badge</string>
<!-- Login --> <string name="login_welcome">Welcome</string> <string name="login_subtitle">Sign in to your reading diary.</string> <string name="login_label_email">Email</string> <string name="login_hint_email">Enter your email</string> <string name="login_label_password">Password</string> <string name="login_hint_password">••••••••</string> <string name="login_btn">Log In</string> <string name="login_forgot">Forgot password?</string> <string name="login_or">Or continue with</string> <string name="login_google">Google</string> <string name="login_no_account">Don\'t have an account?</string> <string name="login_create">Create an account</string> <string name="cd_google_logo">Google logo</string>
<!-- Register --> <string name="register_title">Create Account</string> <string name="register_header">Create your Account</string> <string name="register_subtitle">Start your reading journey today.</string> <string name="register_label_username">User Name</string> <string name="register_hint_username">User Name</string> <string name="register_label_email">Email Address</string> <string name="register_hint_email">example@gmail.com</string> <string name="register_label_password">Password</string> <string name="register_hint_password">Min. 8 characters</string> <string name="register_label_confirm">Confirm Password</string> <string name="register_hint_confirm">Repeat your password</string> <string name="register_btn">Create Account</string> <string name="register_or">OR</string> <string name="register_have_account">Already have an account?</string> <string name="register_login">Log in</string>
<!-- Forgot Password --> <string name="forgot_title">Forgot Password</string> <string name="forgot_subtitle">Enter your registered email address to find your account and reset your password.</string> <string name="forgot_label_email">Email Address</string> <string name="forgot_hint_email">example@email.com</string> <string name="forgot_btn">Find My Account</string> <string name="forgot_remember">Remember your password?</string> <string name="forgot_login">Log in</string>
<!-- Reset Password --> <string name="reset_title">Reset Password</string> <string name="reset_subtitle">Enter your new password below to regain access to your account.</string> <string name="reset_label_new">New Password</string> <string name="reset_hint_password">••••••••</string> <string name="reset_label_confirm">Confirm New Password</string> <string name="reset_btn">Reset Password</string> <string name="reset_remember">Remember your password?</string> <string name="reset_login">Log in</string>
<!-- Bottom Navigation --> <string name="nav_home">Home</string> <string name="nav_search">Search</string> <string name="nav_add">Add</string> <string name="nav_diary">Diary</string> <string name="nav_profile">Profile</string>
<!-- Home Dashboard --> <string name="home_title">Book Diary</string> <string name="home_search_hint">Search books, authors…</string> <string name="home_filter">Filter</string> <string name="home_notifications">Notifications</string> <string name="home_favorites_title">Favourite Books</string> <string name="home_see_all">See all</string> <string name="home_all_books_title">All Books</string> <string name="home_empty_favorites">No favourites yet.\nMark a book as favourite to see it here.</string> <string name="home_empty_books">No books yet</string> <string name="home_empty_books_sub">Tap + to add your first book to your diary</string>
<!-- Search & Filter screen --> <string name="search_title">Search Books</string> <string name="search_hint">Title, author, or category</string> <string name="search_label_categories">Categories</string> <string name="search_label_rating">Minimum Rating</string> <string name="search_favorites_only">Favourites Only</string> <string name="search_results_header">Search Results</string> <string name="search_empty_title">No results found</string> <string name="search_empty_sub">Try a different query or adjust your filters</string>
<!-- Content descriptions --> <string name="cd_back">Back</string> </resources>
